provenance-confidence-baseline.reason: needs the live grounded path on the same corpus

raw-model-logprob-baseline.reason: needs base-model logprobs on the same corpus

trace-feature-verifier.reason: needs a real labelled trace corpus + a fit on a disjoint split

criticalFailures: no_real_corpus: requires a decontaminated, gold-labelled trace corpus (synthetic traces are not evidence)
labels_not_2family: correctness labels are not >= 2 independent judge families (kappa >= 0.40)
no_leakage_audit: the no-answer-leakage feature audit has not been run
no_effect: delta AUROC must be >= 0.05 with a 95% CI excluding 0
scaling_not_3sizes: the scaling-monotonicity headline needs >= 3 base sizes on identical traces
headline: PENDING — machinery only; no real labelled-trace run has been performed
note: Intentionally PENDING. The --mock mode exercises the AUROC/ECE/delta+CI math over synthetic traces (tests/test_calibration_verifier_eval.py), but synthetic traces are not evidence: no claim about real answer correctness is made. Promotion needs a decontaminated gold-labelled trace corpus, >= 2 independent judge families, a no-answer-leakage feature audit, and (for the scaling headline) >= 3 base sizes — see the measurement_spec and the calibration-verifier-scaling row in agi-proof/failure-ledger.md.
